overview.description: The Vanguard Long-Term Tax-Exempt Bond ETF (VTEL) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund tracks an index of investment-grade, tax-exempt US municipal bonds with maturities over 10 years. It accomplishes this by selecting a mix of bonds similar to those in the index. VTEL was launched on May 20, 2025 and is issued by Vanguard.
infoTable: S&P 10+ Year National AMT-Free Municipal Bond Index
